# China Network

Fast, global network serving visitors inside and outside of China

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Cloudflare China Network](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/index.md): Deliver secure, fast content in Mainland China through Cloudflare and JD Cloud data centers.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/get-started/index.md): Set up the Cloudflare China Network package on your Enterprise plan.

## Videos

- [Videos](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/videos/index.md): Watch videos about Cloudflare China Network features and configuration.

## FAQ

- [FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/faq/index.md): Review FAQs for Cloudflare's China Network.

## concepts

- [China Authoritative DNS](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/concepts/china-dns/index.md): Resolve DNS queries in Mainland China to improve Time to First Byte performance.
- [Global Acceleration](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/concepts/global-acceleration/index.md): Simplify global asset deployment in China with connectivity from CMI, CBC Tech, and JD Cloud.
- [Internet Content Provider (ICP)](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/concepts/icp/index.md): Obtain and display an ICP license number required for websites operating in China.

## reference

- [Available products and features](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/reference/available-products/index.md): Cloudflare products and features supported on the China Network operated by JD Cloud.
- [Infrastructure](https://developers.cloudflare.com/china-network/reference/infrastructure/index.md): China data center locations, network IP addresses, and API endpoints.
